params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of transactions to return in this page (page size).

params.name: filter
params.description: Subset of transactions by processing state. Public enum is UPPER_SNAKE; the server lowercases for validation (legacy lowercase query values are still accepted).

params.name: from
params.description: Lower bound on transaction `created_at` (inclusive), ISO-8601 date-time.

params.name: to
params.description: Upper bound on transaction `created_at` (inclusive), ISO-8601 date-time.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response field `next_cursor`. Omit on the first page; pass the last `next_cursor` value as `cursor` to fetch the next page.

params.name: statuses
params.description: Filter listed transactions to these mapped status values (applied after fetch; may affect how rows align with `total_count`).

params.name: amount_from
params.description: Minimum transaction amount to include.

params.name: amount_to
params.description: Maximum transaction amount to include.

params.name: currencies
params.description: Only include transactions in one of these currency codes.

params.name: transaction_type
params.description: Restrict to pay-in or pay-out. Public enum is UPPER_SNAKE; the server lowercases for validation (legacy lowercase query values are still accepted).

params.name: withdrawal_methods
params.description: Filter by withdrawal / payout method identifiers.

params.name: last_days
params.description: Only include transactions created in the last N days.

params.name: type
params.description: Additional transaction type filter (backend-specific string).

params.name: include_running_total
params.description: When true, each row may include a running total over the result set.
